title: Bylina: Sadko and the Sea King
description: A merchant-musician is taken to the bottom of the sea and must play his gusli for the Sea King — his music causes storms.
introduction: A merchant-musician is taken to the bottom of the sea and must play his gusli for the Sea King — his music causes storms.

translation.text: Sadko played his gusli at the bottom of the sea, and the Sea King danced, and the waves rose high.
